ksa_text: Knowledge of DataOps principles and practices, including pipeline automation, environment management, data testing strategies, configuration-as-code, and the distinction between DataOps, DevOps, and MLOps as complementary disciplines.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from AI & ML Infrastructure (domain affinity 0.38); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
